div.p: Expansion performed internally based on codesystem Nepal HMIS Caste and Ethnicity Group Code System v0.1.0 (CodeSystem)

tr.td: Disadvantaged or marginalized groups under national dalit schedules
Relatively advantaged hill and plain socio-cultural groups
Other unclassified ethnic or linguistic identities
